Commentary: Adil Rashid to Shubman Gill, no run, tossed up on middle, Gill fends it to the off-side

Adil Rashid to Shubman Gill, 3 runs, quicker around off, Gill makes room and chops the cut past backward point. Races away towards the fence and the duo get back for the third before the ball gets picked up by the fielder
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, no run, attempted sweep from Rohit. He misses and the ball hits him high on the back thigh
-- This is the first instance of both teams recording 100+ opening partnership in an ODI at Lord’s.
Will Jacks, right-arm off break, comes into the attack
Will Jacks to Shubman Gill, no run, 83ks delivery on middle. Gill closes the bat face early and gets a leading edge towards cover

Will Jacks to Shubman Gill, FOUR, top shot! Gill makes room and cuts the ball that was on the stumps. Times it well to beat the point fielder and runs away. The fielder gives chase and tries to pull it back in, but the slope ensures the ball hits the fence
Will Jacks to Shubman Gill, no run, driven to cover
Will Jacks to Shubman Gill, no run, sweep and a miss. The impact was outside the line as the ball hits Gill's pad
Will Jacks to Shubman Gill, 1 run, Gill stays on the back foot and mistimes the pull down to long-on
Will Jacks to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, off-break on off and middle, Rohit helps it with the turn to square leg
Gus Atkinson [5.0-0-16-0] is back into the attack
Atkinson to Rohit Sharma, no run, big swing and a miss. Rohit wanted to hit the back of a length delivery to orbit. Missed by a long way

Atkinson to Rohit Sharma, no run, appeal for LBW! That looked like it was going over the stumps. Nips into the right-hander and hits Rohit's back thigh on the attempted pull shot. England decide not to review
Atkinson to Rohit Sharma, no run, good length delivery outside off, driven towards mid-off

Atkinson to Rohit Sharma, FOUR, Rohit was desperate for a boundary and gets one this ball. He moves a long way across his stumps and paddles it fine. Fielder in the deep was nowhere in the picture to stop that

Atkinson to Rohit Sharma, FOUR, fifty for Rohit. His 63rd in ODIs. Clever shot from Rohit. Goes across yet again and picks the fuller length delivery early. Scoops it fine again and gets to the milestone. Raises his bat to the crowd, who applaud the effort
Atkinson to Rohit Sharma, no run, good length delivery outside off, knocked to the off-side
Will Jacks to Shubman Gill, no run, turning into the right-hander, Gill turns to the on-side
Will Jacks to Shubman Gill, SIX, to deep mid-wicket
Will Jacks to Shubman Gill, 2 runs, to deep extra cover
Will Jacks to Shubman Gill, 1 run, to mid-wicket

Only the second instance of openers from both teams hitting 50+ scores in an ODI in
England; the previous came at Chester-Le-Street when Finch & Head scored
for Australia and Roy & Bairstow for England.
Will Jacks to Rohit Sharma, no run, off-break on middle, tucked to the on-side
Will Jacks to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, punched down to long-on and keeps the strike with a single
Physio is out there to have a look at Gill, who is struggling with cramps. He is still stretching and checks if everything is fine.
Adil Rashid [3.0-0-16-0] is back into the attack
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, 2 runs, short and wide outside off, Rohit rocks on the back foot and cuts it through point region.

140+ opening stands for both sides in an ODI
Tendulkar/Sehwag (153) & Dilshan/Tharanga (188) Rajkot 2009
Duckett/Bethell (192) & Rohit/Gill (147) Lord’s 2026
Adil Rashid to Virat Kohli, 1 run, off the mark. Driven down to long-on
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, no run, nicely bowled. Rohit looks to block and gets a thick inside edge to the on-side
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, driven down to long-on. End of a successful by Adil Rashid
Jofra Archer to Rohit Sharma, no run, swing and a miss. Rohit throws his bat at a wide delivery outside off and misses
Jofra Archer to Rohit Sharma, no run, another beaten. Wanted to dab the wide delivery outside off, can't get bat on ball
Jofra Archer to Rohit Sharma, no run, three beatens in a row. This skids off the surface and sneaks under the bat of Rohit. Goes past the off-stump to the keeper
Jofra Archer to Rohit Sharma, no run, good length delivery on off, Rohit defends it to the right of Archer
Jofra Archer to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, width outside off, Rohit goes hard and throws his bat at the ball. Opens the bat face slightly and hits it wide of diving point
Jofra Archer to Virat Kohli, 1 run, Kohli drops it in front of mid-on and scampers across for a run
Adil Rashid to Virat Kohli, 1 run, short delivery on middle, pulled to deep mid-wicket. Straight to the fielder on the bounce
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, FOUR, poor delivery down the leg. Rohit helps it on its way to the on-side. Doesn't get it of the middle but has enough to go for four
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, 2 runs, short and wide outside off, cut to the right of point for a brace
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, quicker and on middle, turned to the on-side
Adil Rashid to Virat Kohli, FOUR, what a shot that is. Over-pitched and Kohli clears his front foot to drill it straight back down the ground. Long-on and long-off had no chance
Adil Rashid to Virat Kohli, 1 run, short on the stumps, Kohli makes room and cuts it to sweeper cover

Highest partnerships for India at Lord’s in ODIs
169 Raina – Dhoni 2014 (5th wkt)
147 Rohit – Gill 2026 (1st wkt)
131*Dravid – Yuvraj 2002 (5th wkt)
121 Yuvraj – Kaif 2002 (6th wkt)
Jofra Archer to Virat Kohli, 1 run, hint of extra bounce for Archer. Kohli gets surprised as he tries to defend. The ball hits the glove and rolls to the on-side
Jofra Archer to Rohit Sharma, no run, beaten again. Stays low and goes under the bat of Rohit outside off
Jofra Archer to Rohit Sharma, 2 runs, to long-off

Shubman Gill today
Before drinks: 56 off 60, Bnd% 15 (FS% 16.3)
Post drinks: 21 off 24, Bnd% 8.33 (FS% 32)
Jofra Archer to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, to third man
Jofra Archer to Virat Kohli, no run, England think about a review and decide against it.
Jofra Archer to Virat Kohli, FOUR, to deep mid-wicket

This is the first instance of each of the four opening batters scoring 75+ in an ODI game.
Duckett 141
Bethell 91
Gill 77
Rohit 79*
Josh Tongue [4.0-1-28-0] is back into the attack
Josh Tongue to Rohit Sharma, no run, good length delivery outside off, pushed to the off-side
Josh Tongue to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, banged into the surface halfway down. Rohit can't get it off the middle. Pulled to deep mid-wicket
Josh Tongue to Virat Kohli, no run, Kohli gets on the front foot and defends it back on the surface

Josh Tongue to Virat Kohli, 1 run, short and wide outside off, Kohli slaps it to the left of sweeper cover. Sam Curran dives to his left and saves a certain boundary. Kohli wanted to get back for the second, but Rohit sends him back
Josh Tongue to Rohit Sharma, wide, bowled well wide of off. Easy call for the umpire
Josh Tongue to Rohit Sharma, SIX, slot ball and Rohit puts it away. Clears his front foot and pumps it over cow corner. Clears the big boundary for a maximum

Josh Tongue to Rohit Sharma, SIX, back-to-back sixes and this one was better than the previous one. Picks the slower delivery and smokes it straight down the ground. Hits it high and long way into the stands
Sam Curran [2.0-0-18-0] is back into the attack
Sam Curran to Virat Kohli, 1 run, slower delivery on middle, Kohli digs it down to long-on
Sam Curran to Rohit Sharma, 2 runs, couple more to the tally. Cuts the short delivery wide of sweeper cover and gets back home comfortably
Sam Curran to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, another slower delivery from Sam Curran.
Sam Curran to Virat Kohli, 1 run, to mid-wicket
Sam Curran to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, Rohit waits on the slower delivery and cuts it to sweeper cover
Sam Curran to Virat Kohli, 1 run, spliced to sweeper cover. Kohli comes down the track and tries to hit it over long-off. The slower delivery takes he leading edge
Adil Rashid [6.0-0-40-1] is back into the attack
Adil Rashid to Virat Kohli, 1 run, to long-on
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, top-edged and hits the helmet on the way. Rohit goes low trying to sweep. The ball hits the grille and rolls to the on-side
Adil Rashid to Virat Kohli, 1 run, driven down to long-on
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, FOUR, to deep mid-wicket
Adil Rashid to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, full and on middle, driven down to long-on
Adil Rashid to Virat Kohli, FOUR, straight down the ground

Most ODI hundreds in a visiting country
8 Rohit Sharma in England
7 Sachin Tendulkar in UAE
7 Saeed Anwar in UAE
7 AB de Villiers in India
7 Quinton de Kock in India
Only Joe Root (10) has more ODI hundreds in England while Marcus Trescothick also has eight.
Drinks are on the field! India have started to accelerate
- Aged 39 years & 80 days, Rohit Sharma is the oldest to score an ODI century at Lord’s and the oldest for India across all formats.

Rohit Sharma also becomes the first Indian batter to score an ODI hundred at Lord’s.
Previous highest: 90 by Sourav Ganguly vs Eng in 2004
Sam Curran to Rohit Sharma, no run, slower delivery angling across Rohit. Big swing and a miss as the ball sneaks under the bat
Sam Curran to Rohit Sharma, no run
Sam Curran to Rohit Sharma, FOUR, gets it through point region. Uses the pace of Sam Curran and cuts it late.
Sam Curran to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, to long-on
Sam Curran to Virat Kohli, 1 run, to deep mid-wicket
Sam Curran to Rohit Sharma, 1 run, to backward square leg

- The highest target successfully chased bw overs 31 & 50 in an ODI is 182 runs by Pakistan against Bangladesh in Mirpur in 2014 and Australia against India in Mohali in 2019. India need 194 off their last 20 overs.
